head.message: rewrite varlen_fwd to CUTE-tile kernel structure

findings.title: AGENTS test command may not execute pytest cases
Status snapshot stale vs current HEAD
findings.recommendation: Update STATUS.md and status.json together whenever reporting status.

findings.title: Invalid NANOVLLM_FA2_MODE can be swallowed by fallback
findings.impact: Typos/config errors may silently degrade to other backend.
findings.recommendation: Do not fallback on mode-validation errors.

findings.title: Debug assert may be bypassed when fallback is enabled
findings.impact: Numerical regressions may be hidden in debug modes.
findings.recommendation: Disable fallback for *_debug or re-raise AssertionError.

findings.title: NVTX include pattern inconsistent across docs
python/python3 command prefix inconsistent
findings.recommendation: Standardize command prefix convention in all docs.

findings.title: docs/test overstates varlen API dtype validation
findings.recommendation: Either add dtype negative tests or narrow doc claim.

findings.title: docs/test under-describes existing varlen GQA/negative coverage
findings.recommendation: Add GQA and unsupported head_dim notes to docs/test.md.

findings.title: batch_man correctness file lacks direct GQA/MQA coverage
findings.impact: Potential gap if batch_man behavior changes for q_heads != kv_heads.
findings.recommendation: Add explicit GQA/MQA correctness cases or document unsupported scope.

findings.title: block_table 'required' wording diverges from runtime normalization
findings.recommendation: Document that None is normalized to empty block_table or enforce strict non-None.

findings.title: Test inventory count matches
findings.recommendation: Keep inventory updated when adding/removing test files.

findings.title: Mode matrix/default routing mostly aligned
findings.recommendation: Keep docs and code synced on fallback/debug caveats.
